name: io.github.nirholas/vanity-mcp
title: three.ws Vanity
description: Read the three.ws vanity-address market: quote difficulty + USDC price, browse the board.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the three.ws API that serves /api/vanity. Override only when self-hosting or targeting a preview deployment.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_WS_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds. All endpoints are reads, so the default is brisk with headroom for a cold cache.
